docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT BUSTAMATA, VANGIE AS TO RESPONDENT AHMED, MUJIB HEARING SET FOR NOV-01-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 821652
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-01-2007 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2007 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT A. MYLES, CLERK CARLA AMADOR, NOT REPORTED. (DEPARTMENT 525)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT AHMED, MUJIB RECOVER FROM APPELLANT BUSTAMATA, VANGIE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, APPELLANT'S EVICTION OF RESPONDENT VIOLATED SECTION 1951.3 OF THE CIVIL CODE AND WAS WRONGFUL. RESPONDENT'S DAMAGES INCLUDE $1,800.00 FOR LOST FURNITURE AND NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (SEE SMALL CLAIMS #821652)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-01-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (Department 525)

Appearances:
Appellant, Vangie Bustamata, is present in propria persona.
Tagalog Interpreter, Ronald Fondilla, present to interpret for the appellant.

Respondent, Mujib Ahmed, is present in propria persona.

This matter comes on calendar for Trial De Novo. The parties sign the stipulation to use Judge Pro Tem to hear the trial. The parties are sworn.

Vangie Bustamata testifies and presents her case on her own behalf through the Tagalog interpreter.

Mujib Ahmed testifies and presents his case on his own behalf.

After hearing all oral testimony, the Court takes the matter under submission. Plaintiff's and Defendant's evidence from the Small Claims remains in the file.
